meta.voice: Brendan Franks — data-first, fragments, contractions, no em-dashes, no banned words. Mention tweets are FRESH posts (not replies) that loop in a high-value account on a story angle they cover. The target account sees a notification, sees the data lede + the AZ Law Now link.
meta.rules: Under 280 chars. The @ tag goes in the FIRST line so the recipient gets a clean notification. Lead with the number. One mention per tweet (cleaner notification, less spam-flag risk).

posts.text: @AZAGMayes — ASU Preparatory Academy's FY24 IRS 990 reports a $5.46M operating loss on $82.4M revenue. The FY21 audit (filed at ade.az.gov) discloses an $11.5M related-party school-building lease through 2032. Note 9 names the counterparty.
posts.reply:
Full write-up with the audit text, federal-funds schedule, and ARS 39-121 public-records path:

azlawnow.com/investigations/asu-prep-related-party-lease/

posts.text: @AZAGMayes — DOJ-EDNY announced the $350M Walgreens opioid settlement in April 2025. Covered conduct: August 2012 through March 2023. Arizona lost 1,659 people in the latest 12-month surveillance window. The AZ store-by-store enumeration sits in the EDNY federal docket.
posts.reply:
Full write-up with the regulator chain (Board of Pharmacy + DEA Phoenix), the statutory frame (ARS 32-1901, 13-3408, 36-2606), and the records that close the gap:

posts.text: @ShatterproofHQ — the federal Walgreens opioid settlement announced in April 2025 covers conduct from 2012 through 2023. Arizona's most recent 12-month overdose count is 1,659. The store-level enumeration of covered AZ Walgreens locations isn't in publicly retrievable secondary press.

posts.text: @AZMirror — quick read for the State of Arizona v. Mullin coverage. Across the street from the proposed 1,500-bed Surprise federal detention facility: Rinchem stores chlorine, hydrofluoric acid, and fluorine. The EPA Risk Management Plan was filed three weeks before the federal warehouse purchase.
